umbrellaTypeReason: Cannot confidently distinguish 19 V2 canonical (brand-architecture) nodes from 50 Phase 1 technical (navigation-taxonomy) nodes without insertion-phase metadata. Node content alone (names, descriptions, parents) does not uniquely identify which phase each umbrella was added in. Misclassification risk too high. Field added to GraphNode interface but no values applied.
validatorRulesAdded: INVALID_BRAND_TIER — brandTier present but not in ['t1','t2_badge','t2_name','t3','unclassified']
INVALID_UMBRELLA_TYPE — umbrellaType present but not in ['brand-architecture','navigation-taxonomy']
UMBRELLA_TYPE_WRONG_TIER — umbrellaType set on non-umbrella-tier node
BROKEN_RELATIONSHIP_REF — relationships[].target does not resolve to an existing ID

validationIssuesRemaining.detail: renamedTo='managed-payments' but managed-payments.renamedFrom missing — paypal and paypal-checkout are both predecessors, renamedFrom can only hold one value
renamedTo='managed-payments' but managed-payments.renamedFrom missing — same multi-predecessor issue as paypal
renamedTo='seller-hub' but seller-hub.renamedFrom missing — seller-hub has multiple predecessors (picture-manager, selling-manager, selling-manager-pro)
renamedTo='seller-hub' but seller-hub.renamedFrom missing — multi-predecessor issue
renamedTo='seller-hub' but seller-hub.renamedFrom missing — multi-predecessor issue
status='unknown' — Seller Center URL returns 404, ebay.academy unreachable. May be renamed or discontinued. Needs human verification.

assumptionsRequiringHumanDecision.detail: goldin is in registry with parent='collectibles-trading'. The task brief specified parent='ebay' for a freestanding platform brand. The existing registry has it under collectibles-trading. Left as-is (already existed; not this pass's decision to reclassify).
depop is in registry with market=['US','UK']. The task brief specified ['US','UK','AU']. Left as-is (existing data, not reclassifying).
caramel is in registry with parent='ebay-motors'. Left as-is (existing data — caramel is an automotive transaction platform, ebay-motors parent is reasonable).

managed-payments is the successor to both paypal and paypal-checkout. The renamedFrom field only holds one value. Either needs: (a) renamedFrom=['paypal','paypal-checkout'] schema change, or (b) choosing primary predecessor. Human decision required.
seller-hub succeeded picture-manager, selling-manager, and selling-manager-pro. Same multi-predecessor issue. Human decision required.
Status set to 'unknown' because ebay.academy is unreachable as of 2026-04-29. May be 'legacy' if discontinued or 'renamed' if rebranded. Human verification of current state required.

73 umbrella nodes exist. Phase comments indicate 19 V2 canonical and 50 technical, but no phase marker distinguishes them in node data. Without insertion-history metadata, classification would be guesswork. Left unclassified.

testsAdded: tests/registry-integrity.test.ts — extended with 6 new tests: goldin/depop/caramel nodes, brandTier validity, umbrellaType validity, relationship target resolution
